articles.title: What's in the US-Iran agreement that's now in effect
articles.description: The 14-paragraph memo includes an end to fighting, an agreement that Iran will never have a nuclear weapon, and a $300bn redevelopment package for Iran.

articles.title: Cervical cancer deaths in England fall to zero in young women given vaccine
articles.description: A new study finds that hundreds of lives have been saved since school-age girls were offered the HPV jab in 2008.

articles.title: Interest rates expected to be held by Bank of England
articles.description: The Bank last cut interest rates in December but upheaval in the Middle East has stalled any further reductions.

articles.title: ChatGPT can be made to generate sexualised and violent images, researchers find
articles.description: But researchers say its still possible to trick the AI chatbot into producing graphic content.
